# MuleSoft ServiceNow Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (6.18) of ServiceNow Connector documentation.
> See [ServiceNow Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/servicenow-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the ServiceNow Connector documentation in one file.

## Content
